title: mirabilis linearis var. decipiens
intro: Mirabilis linearis var. decipiens is a lesser-known variety of the four o'clock plant (Mirabilis jalapa), a flowering plant native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Mirabilis linearis var. decipiens include treating skin conditions such as acne, wounds, and minor cuts, as well as providing relief from fever and rheumatic pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
